languages.text: Тайная комната совсем не похожа на Сектор Бионика — скорее, на чей-то кабинет. А значит, здесь должны найтись какие-то записи.

traits.locale_text: Тайная комната совсем не похожа на Сектор Бионика — скорее, на чей-то кабинет. А значит, здесь должны найтись какие-то записи.

languages.text: The secret chamber bears no resemblance to the Sector Bionica. It feels more like someone's private study. Therefore, some manner of records must be hidden here.
languages.original_text: Тайная комната совсем не похожа на Сектор Бионика — скорее, на чей-то кабинет. А значит, здесь должны найтись какие-то записи.

traits.locale_text: The secret chamber bears no resemblance to the Sector Bionica. It feels more like someone's private study. Therefore, some manner of records must be hidden here.
The secret chamber bears no resemblance to the Sector Bionica. It feels more like someone's private study. Therefore, some manner of records must be hidden here.
The secret chamber bears no resemblance to the Sector Bionica. It feels more like someone's private study. Therefore, some manner of records must be hidden here.
The secret chamber bears no resemblance to the Sector Bionica. It feels more like someone's private study. Therefore, some manner of records must be hidden here.

languages.text: Die Geheimkammer hat keine Ähnlichkeit mit dem Sektor Bionica. Sie erinnert eher an ein privates Arbeitszimmer. Es müssen also irgendwelche Aufzeichnungen zu finden sein.
languages.original_text: The secret chamber bears no resemblance to the Sector Bionica. It feels more like someone's private study. Therefore, some manner of records must be hidden here.

traits.locale_text: Die Geheimkammer hat keine Ähnlichkeit mit dem Sektor Bionica. Sie erinnert eher an ein privates Arbeitszimmer. Es müssen also irgendwelche Aufzeichnungen zu finden sein.

languages.text: La pièce secrète ne ressemble à rien qu'on puisse trouver dans le secteur Bionica. Il semble s'agir d'un bureau privé, qui doit sûrement contenir des documents personnels.
languages.original_text: The secret chamber bears no resemblance to the Sector Bionica. It feels more like someone's private study. Therefore, some manner of records must be hidden here.

traits.locale_text: La pièce secrète ne ressemble à rien qu'on puisse trouver dans le secteur Bionica. Il semble s'agir d'un bureau privé, qui doit sûrement contenir des documents personnels.

languages.text: 这间密室跟仿生区完全不同，更像是私人书房。所以，这里一定藏着某种记录。
languages.original_text: The secret chamber bears no resemblance to the Sector Bionica. It feels more like someone's private study. Therefore, some manner of records must be hidden here.

traits.locale_text: 这间密室跟仿生区完全不同，更像是私人书房。所以，这里一定藏着某种记录。

languages.text: La sala secreta no se parece en nada al Sector Bionica. Más bien se trata de un estudio privado. Debe de haber algún registro oculto aquí dentro.
languages.original_text: The secret chamber bears no resemblance to the Sector Bionica. It feels more like someone's private study. Therefore, some manner of records must be hidden here.

traits.locale_text: La sala secreta no se parece en nada al Sector Bionica. Más bien se trata de un estudio privado. Debe de haber algún registro oculto aquí dentro.

languages.text: 秘密の部屋は壁の向こうのバイオニック・セクターのようなものではなく、誰かのオフィスのようなものだ。つまり、ここには何らかの記録があるに違いない。
languages.original_text: The secret room isn't like the Bionic Sector behind the wall — it's more like someone's office. Which means there must be some kind of records in here.

languages.text: Gizli oda, Sektör Biyonika'ya hiç benzemiyor. Daha çok birinin özel çalışma odası gibi hissettiriyor. Bu nedenle burada bir çeşit kayıtlar gizlenmiş olmalı.
languages.original_text: The secret chamber bears no resemblance to the Sector Bionica. It feels more like someone's private study. Therefore, some manner of records must be hidden here.

traits.locale_text: Gizli oda, Sektör Biyonika'ya hiç benzemiyor. Daha çok birinin özel çalışma odası gibi hissettiriyor. Bu nedenle burada bir çeşit kayıtlar gizlenmiş olmalı.
